candidates.name: Mike Chen

Mike Chen
Frontend Developer

questions: Tell us about your experience relevant to the Senior Frontend Developer position.
Describe a challenging project you worked on and how you handled it.
How do you stay updated with the latest trends in Engineering?
Walk us through your approach to React.
Describe a time you had to collaborate with a cross-functional team.
What motivates you to apply for this Senior Frontend Developer role?
How do you prioritize tasks when working under tight deadlines?
answers: I have 5 years of React experience building scalable SPAs.
I led a migration from class components to hooks, reducing bundle size by 30%.
I follow React blogs, attend conferences, and contribute to open source.
I use component-driven development with Storybook and write comprehensive tests.
I collaborated with designers and backend engineers on a major product launch.
I am passionate about building great user experiences with modern frontend tech.
I use priority matrices and communicate early when deadlines are at risk.
interviews.strengths: Demonstrates solid technical knowledge. Shows good problem-solving approach. Communicates ideas clearly.
interviews.weaknesses: Could provide more specific examples. Limited depth in some technical areas.
